name: face-antispoof-onnx
desc: Ultra-lightweight (600KB) Face Anti-Spoofing classifier. Optimized MiniFASNetV2-SE implementation validated on 70k+ samples with ~98% accuracy for edge devices.
descFull: Ultra-lightweight (600KB) Face Anti-Spoofing classifier. Optimized MiniFASNetV2-SE implementation validated on 70k+ samples with ~98% accuracy for edge devices.
